title: Add configurable vesting for DeltaOne reward emissions
description:
Summary

Add token-level vesting controls for Hokusai reward emissions so that tokens earned from verified model improvements are not fully liquid immediately. The default should be:

Immediate unlock: 10%
Vesting duration: 12 months
Vesting schedule: linear
Scope: applies to contributor rewards minted from DeltaOne improvements

This is needed because early Hokusai tokens may launch with shallow reserves. If a contributor receives a large liquid reward and immediately sells into the CRR AMM, they can drain a large percentage of the reserve. Vesting preserves meaningful contributor ownership while preventing immediate reserve extraction.

Repo context

The current token system already has the right high-level split:

HokusaiToken is a controller-minted ERC20. Only the controller can mint/burn tokens, and TokenManager acts as the minting controller. The README describes TokenManager as responsible for minting contributor rewards based on model performance, and DeltaVerifier as responsible for processing performance improvements and triggering reward distribution.  

The contracts directory already includes HokusaiToken, TokenManager, DeltaVerifier, HokusaiParams, HokusaiAMM, and related infrastructure contracts, so vesting should be added as part of the reward distribution path rather than as a separate unrelated token type.  

Requirement

Add a configurable vesting policy at the token/model level. When DeltaVerifier calculates a reward, TokenManager should route the reward through a vesting mechanism instead of minting the full amount directly to the contributor.

Default policy:

vestingEnabled: true
immediateUnlockBps: 1000
vestingDurationSeconds: 365 days
vestingCliffSeconds: 0
vestingSchedule: linear

Expected behavior

When a contributor earns 250,000 tokens:

25,000 tokens are immediately liquid
225,000 tokens vest linearly over 12 months
Contributor can claim vested tokens over time
Unvested tokens cannot be sold, transferred, or routed into the AMM
Events should make the full reward, liquid amount, and vested amount observable

Suggested implementation shape

Add vesting fields to token params:

struct VestingConfig {
bool enabled;
uint16 immediateUnlockBps;
uint64 vestingDurationSeconds;
uint64 cliffSeconds;
}

Add to HokusaiParams:

function vestingEnabled() external view returns (bool);
function immediateUnlockBps() external view returns (uint16);
function vestingDurationSeconds() external view returns (uint64);
function cliffSeconds() external view returns (uint64);

Add a new contract:

RewardVestingVault.sol

Responsibilities:

createVestingSchedule(modelId, token, beneficiary, totalAmount, immediateAmount, vestingAmount, duration, cliff)
claim(scheduleId)
claimable(scheduleId)
vestedAmount(scheduleId)
unvestedAmount(scheduleId)

TokenManager changes

Current reward minting path should be changed from:

token.mint(contributor, rewardAmount)

to:

if vesting disabled:
token.mint(contributor, rewardAmount)

if vesting enabled:
immediateAmount = rewardAmount \* immediateUnlockBps / 10000
vestedAmount = rewardAmount - immediateAmount
token.mint(contributor, immediateAmount)
token.mint(vestingVault, vestedAmount)
vestingVault.createSchedule(…)

Batch minting should apply the same logic per contributor.

Events

Add events similar to:

event RewardVestingCreated(
string indexed modelId,
address indexed contributor,
uint256 totalReward,
uint256 immediateAmount,
uint256 vestedAmount,
uint256 vestingStart,
uint256 vestingEnd
);

event VestedRewardClaimed(
string indexed modelId,
address indexed contributor,
uint256 amount
);

Acceptance criteria

A token can be deployed with a custom vesting config.

If no vesting config is provided, the token defaults to 10% immediate unlock and 12-month linear vesting.

DeltaVerifier reward calculations do not change.

TokenManager reward distribution changes so DeltaOne rewards are partially liquid and partially vested.

Batch rewards support vesting.

Contributor can claim vested tokens over time.

Unvested tokens cannot be transferred or sold.

Tests cover:

default 10% immediate / 90% vested behavior
custom immediate unlock percentage
custom vesting duration
zero cliff linear vesting
batch rewards
claim before vesting
partial claim after 6 months
full claim after 12 months
vesting disabled
attempted over-claim
AMM cannot drain unvested rewards

Suggested stubs

contracts/RewardVestingVault.sol
contracts/interfaces/IRewardVestingVault.sol
test/RewardVestingVault.test.js
test/TokenManager.vesting.test.js
test/DeltaVerifier.vesting.integration.test.js

Key product note

This should be described in the UI as “reward liquidity schedule,” not as a penalty. Contributors still earn the full Hokusai token reward for verified model improvement, but most of the reward becomes liquid over time to protect early token reserves and align contributors with long-term model usage.
